competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.union([
        RT.object({x: RT.string()}),
        RT.object({x: RT.string(), y: RT.number()}),
        RT.object({x: RT.string(), y: RT.number(), z: RT.boolean()}),
      ])
    )
